name: Easy Antipasto Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Arrange the chicken in a 9x13" baking pan.
2. Pour half of the Italian dressing over the chicken.
3. Sprinkle salt, pepper, and chopped green peppers over the chicken.
4. Scatter onion rings and sliced tomatoes on top of the chicken.
5. Drizzle remaining Italian dressing over the vegetables.
6. Sprinkle Parmesan cheese evenly over everything.
7. Bake in a preheated oven until the chicken is cooked through and the vegetables are tender, about 30-35 minutes.
